ReleaseNotes:
Phase 5 Update - Stability & Data Integrity

Fixes & Improvements:
- CRITICAL: Fixed broken automated backup configuration.
- Dynamic Metadata: Stock In form now loads categories and manufacturers from live database.
- Performance: Optimized medicine creation workflow to reduce redundant database hits.
- UI/UX: Added vertical scrolling to Inventory page for better accessibility on smaller screens.
- Resolved compilation errors in StockInViewModel.
